debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ range (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A) = 𝒫 A

proof:
by
  ext Y
  constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨X, rfl⟩
    intro y hy
    rcases hy with ⟨x, hxX, rfl⟩
    exact x.property
  · intro hY
    refine ⟨{x : A | x.val ∈ Y}, ?_⟩
    ext y
    constructor
    · intro hy
      rcases hy with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      have hyA : y ∈ A := hY hy
      refine ⟨⟨y, hyA⟩, ?_, rfl⟩
      exact hy
